# Google AI MCP

FastMCP 3.2 MCP server providing access to Google AI services via the Model Context Protocol.

## Architecture

- **Backend**: FastMCP 3.2 (Python 3.12+) on port 11014
- **Frontend**: Vite React (TypeScript) on port 11015
- **MCP Transport**: Streamable HTTP at /mcp
- **REST API**: FastAPI at /api/*
- **Native**: Tauri 2.0 desktop wrapper in native/

## Key Files

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `src/google_ai_mcp/server.py` | FastMCP server + MCP tools |
| `src/google_ai_mcp/web.py` | FastAPI REST endpoints |
| `src/google_ai_mcp/chat_client.py` | Gemini/Gemma chat client |
| `src/google_ai_mcp/imagen_client.py` | Nano Banana image client |
| `src/google_ai_mcp/veo_client.py` | Veo video client |
| `src/google_ai_mcp/omni_client.py` | Gemini Omni any-to-any multimodal client |
| `src/google_ai_mcp/lyria_client.py` | Lyria music client |
| `src/google_ai_mcp/speech_client.py` | TTS + Live speech client |
| `src/google_ai_mcp/embeddings_client.py` | Text embeddings client |
| `src/google_ai_mcp/clients_registry.py` | LRU-cached client factory |
| `start.ps1` | Fleet start script |
| `justfile` | Task runner |
| `pyproject.toml` | Python project config |
| `webapp/` | React frontend |
| `native/` | Tauri 2.0 desktop wrapper |

## Dependencies

- fastapi >= 0.115.0
- fastmcp >= 3.2.0
- google-genai >= 1.20.0
- google-cloud-aiplatform >= 1.127.0
- pydantic >= 2.0.0
